About Franklin Avenue Dental Care Dr. Barsky is totally committed to your comfort. He was selected by the Consumers’ Research Council of America as one of America’s Top Dentists for 2010/2011 and 2015/2016 and Patient’s Choice Award for 2016 and 2018-2019. He is also a designated provider for Porcelain Veneers Smile Makeover! We are very proud to introduce you to our state of the art cosmetically oriented dental practice. We provide a very safe, very comfortable and extremely friendly environment. We specialize in complete Smile Lift and Smile Makeover procedures to not only make your teeth look better but make you feel better. We truly believe in the old saying : “When you smile, the whole world smiles with you.
